title: Iotran Defense Technologies
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Iotran Defense Technologies''' was a relatively tiny company located on [[Iotra]]. They produced specialized weapons for use by the [[Iotran Police Force]]. Many of their weapons were employed by skilled veterans of the Police Force, called the [[Iotran Braceman Council]]. The weapons produced by the IDT helped the Iotran Bracemen achieve a 95% capture rate in their endeavours.<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
